description: Maps paper claims to implementation artifacts and experimental evidence.

claims.evidence: benchmark_results.json field n_benchmarks=29, with 29 entries in benchmarks array
15 VERIFIED/SOUND + 13 BOUNDED_GUARANTEE/BOUNDED_SOUND = 28 with guarantees, 1 UNKNOWN. Actual count is 28, not 24.
claims.actual: 28 circuits with sound guarantees (15 SOUND, 13 BOUNDED_SOUND), 1 UNKNOWN

claims.evidence: toggle_switch: full=7, no_ai=11 (+57%). repressilator: full=10, no_ai=14 (+40%). Average increase is 47%, not 32%.
claims.actual: 47% more iterations without AI (averaged over 2 circuits in ablation)

claims.evidence: SoundnessLevel enum with SOUND, DELTA_SOUND, BOUNDED, APPROXIMATE. Supports comparison operators and meet().
validate_certificate() function. Also: ProofCertificate, FlowpipeCertificate, InvariantCertificate, SoundnessCertificate classes.
WellFormednessChecker class with check_all(), check_contract_compatibility(), check_progress_condition(). Also TopologyAnalyzer and CircularAGChecker.
MomentEquations class with compute_mean_odes(), compute_covariance_odes(), _propensity_moment_expansion(). Supports normal closure.
DeltaPropagator class with cumulative_delta property, record_iteration(), to_error_budget(). Tracks additive/multiplicative delta compounding.
PredictionQualityMonitor class with sliding-window precision/F1 tracking, per-family metrics, auto-disable on quality degradation.
CrossValidator class with k-fold cross-validation returning TrainingReport (precision, recall, F1, loss per fold). TrainingDataGenerator for trace collection.

7 strategy classes: StructuralRefinement, MonotonicityRefinement, TimeScaleRefinement, InterpolationRefinement, SimulationGuidedRefinement, RefinementCombinator, AIGuidedRefinement. At least 5 core strategies confirmed.
QRPreconditioner class with precondition() and back_transform() methods. Used in ValidatedODEIntegrator._qr_preconditioned_step() for wrapping-effect mitigation.
MonotonicityRefinement class exists. Docstring describes 'reducing refinement from exponential to logarithmic in precision' but does not use the exact O(m log(x_max/eps)) notation.
claims.note: Complexity described qualitatively as logarithmic, not with exact big-O notation

claims.evidence: ErrorBudget dataclass tracking delta, epsilon, truncation, discretization errors. propagate_errors() computes RSS composition. Attached to SoundnessAnnotation via with_error_budget().

notes: Claim '24 circuits verified with sound guarantees': actual count is 28 (15 SOUND + 13 BOUNDED_SOUND).
Claim '32% more iterations without AI': actual increase is 47% averaged over the 2-circuit ablation set.
